items.title: US launches fresh strikes as Iran closes Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The strikes follow an attack on a Cyprus -flagged vessel travelling through the critical waterway.

items.title: US senator and close Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'
items.summary: Donald Trump paid tribute to the 71-year-old South Carolina senator, calling him a "true American patriot" who will be "greatly missed".

items.title: Badly burned British couple rescued from ravine during Spain wildfires, reports say
items.summary: The unnamed pair were found semi-conscious with 40% burns after being trapped by the blazes raging through Almeria province, local media reports.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 哈米尼葬禮驚見紅旗海！紐時：伊朗強硬派藉復仇聲浪 延續對美戰火
items.summary: 在出席伊朗已故最高領袖哈米尼葬禮的人海中，代表伊斯蘭教什葉派復仇象徵的紅旗格外醒目。這被外界視為一項毫不掩飾的政治聲明，要求德黑蘭應該繼續與美國進行戰爭。  紐約時報12...…

items.title: 川普稱美國已「重創」伊朗
items.summary: 美國總統川普12日表示，美國已「重創」伊朗，以回應德黑蘭當局對荷姆茲海峽上的船隻發動的最新攻擊。  川普是在接受美國有線電視新聞網（CNN）電話訪問時，做上述表示。川普說：...…

items.title: 美伊交火掀航安疑慮 川普：荷莫茲海峽開放商船通行
items.summary: 美國與伊朗仍持續交火，引發各界對於荷莫茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）的安全疑慮，但美國總統川普今天表示，荷莫茲海峽已開放商船通行。  路透社報導，荷莫茲海峽是全球最重要石油運...…
